parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'

WITH issues AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.project_id, c.contract_type, c.title, c.status, c.amount_eur,
         c.generated_at, c.sent_at, c.expires_at,
         EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - c.generated_at)::int AS days_since_generated,
         CASE WHEN c.sent_at IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - c.sent_at)::int ELSE NULL END AS days_since_sent,
         CASE WHEN c.expires_at IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM c.expires_at - now())::int ELSE NULL END AS days_to_expiry,
         CASE
           WHEN c.status = 'draft' AND c.generated_at < now() - INTERVAL '5 days' THEN 'draft_unsent_5d'
           WHEN c.status IN ('sent','ready_to_sign') AND c.sent_at < now() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 'sent_unsigned_7d'
           WHEN c.status IN ('sent','ready_to_sign','draft') AND c.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND c.expires_at < now() THEN 'expired'
           WHEN c.status IN ('sent','ready_to_sign','draft') AND c.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND c.expires_at BETWEEN now() AND (now() + INTERVAL '5 days') THEN 'expiring_soon_5d'
           ELSE NULL
         END AS issue_type,
         p.name AS project_name
  FROM contracts c
  JOIN projects p ON p.id = c.project_id
  WHERE c.status NOT IN ('signed','cancelled','rejected')
)
SELECT json_agg(issues.* ORDER BY (CASE issue_type
  WHEN 'expired' THEN 1 WHEN 'expiring_soon_5d' THEN 2
  WHEN 'sent_unsigned_7d' THEN 3 WHEN 'draft_unsent_5d' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END), days_since_generated DESC) AS rows,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE issue_type IS NOT NULL) AS issue_count
  FROM issues
  WHERE issue_type IS NOT NULL;
